Name: Dr. Laurie Olsen
Why They Matter: SEAL works with 200+ schools in CA on PreK-3 bilingual academic language. She knows every DLI director personally. SEAL model is complementary to Explore - they focus on pedagogy, not curriculum content.
Next Step: Research SEAL partner districts. Approach Laurie about Explore as curriculum complement to SEAL model.

Name: Guadalupe Guerrero
Why They Matter: SFUSD has one of the largest DLI programs in CA. 20+ DLI schools. Major adopter. If presenting at CABE, he's signaling bilingual education priority.
Next Step: Verify current role. Identify SFUSD DLI coordinator for direct outreach.

Name: Dr. Cristina Alfaro
Why They Matter: SDSU runs teacher credentialing programs for bilingual teachers across southern CA. Deep connections to DLI districts in San Diego County.
Next Step: Ask for introductions to DLI coordinators in SD County districts.

Name: Dr. Kathy Escamilla
Why They Matter: Leading biliteracy researcher. Her Literacy Squared/biliteracy framework is used by many DLI programs. CU Boulder connection relevant for Colorado strategy.
Next Step: Potential research partner or endorser for Explore. CO tie-in.

Name: Francisca Sánchez
Why They Matter: PD provider to DLI districts across CA. If she trains teachers, she can recommend curriculum. Distribution channel for Explore.
Next Step: Explore partnership: Explore curriculum + META PD = bundled offering.

Name: CABE Planning Committee
